intro: Questions about a stick, a size, or a custom order? Send us a message and we will get back to you.
deliveryText: Sticks are made to order, boxed carefully and sent tracked. Full delivery times and our returns policy will be confirmed before the shop opens.
sizingText: For a support cane: stand upright in your usual shoes, arms relaxed, and measure from the floor to the crease of your wrist. That length is a good starting point — tell us your height and we will help.
